ink.$description: Primary text + primary CTA fill on light theme. The ink-CTA semantic of v1.1.

parchment.$description: Primary text + primary CTA fill on dark theme. Cream that reads as text on cocoa.

bg.$description: Light theme app background. Round-6 deepened from #F1EDE3 for visible card lift.

card.$description: Light theme card surface. Warm off-white (was #FFFFFF) — pure white was «бьёт по глазам» on cream bg #E8E0D0. New value preserves visible luma delta without optical glare. PO directive 2026-04-29.

inset.$description: Light theme depressed surface (text inputs, search wells, chips, citations, tabs-track).

bg.$description: Dark theme app background. Neutral cool dark, NOT warm cocoa (v1.1 pivot).

card.$description: Dark theme card surface. Round-6 luma bump from #1D1D22 for clearer card lift.

inset.$description: Dark theme depressed surface — darker than card so depressed reads as recessed.

user-bubble.$description: Dark theme user chat bubble — subtle teal-tinted dark, distinct from inset.

deep.$description: Forest-jade for light theme — status / citation / verified accent. NOT teal, NOT money-green.

bright.$description: Forest-jade for dark theme — status accent. Lifted from #4A8775 (3.87:1 sub-AA on #26262E) to #5C9A85 (≈4.72:1 AA pass) per 2026-04-29 a11y audit. Keeps forest-jade spirit; survives OLED without glow-creep.

deep.$description: Bronze for light theme — drift / negative delta / danger / warning. Old leather, NOT orange.

bright.$description: Bronze for dark theme — drift / danger. Red-shifted bronze, NOT alarm-red.

text-secondary-light.$description: Secondary text — light theme. 7.91:1 on bg (AAA).

text-tertiary-light.$description: Tertiary text — light theme. Lifted from #6E6E6E (3.82:1 sub-AA) to #5A5A5A (≈4.97:1 AA pass) per 2026-04-29 a11y audit. Drives every eyebrow / meta / mono label.

text-secondary-dark.$description: Secondary text — dark theme. 9.49:1 on bg (AAA).

text-tertiary-dark.$description: Tertiary text — dark theme. 5.20:1 on bg (AAA body).

dark-1.$description: Chart series 1 (jade bright) — dark theme. Lifted to match {color.jade.bright} (a11y bump 2026-04-29).

light-8.$description: Chart series 8 (ochre / deep gold) — light theme. Editorial extension scoped to charts ONLY; do not surface on UI buttons / text / borders. Reads as «aged paper highlight», sits cleanly on cream bg. CB-verified by L-step ≥8 vs adjacent series.

light-9.$description: Chart series 9 (aubergine / deep wine) — light theme. CHART-ONLY. Replaces the «blue» categorical without breaking the no-blue rule — reads as ink with deep wine hue. CB-verified.

light-10.$description: Chart series 10 (cobalt-ink / deep blueish-black) — light theme. CHART-ONLY. Reads ~80% as ink with subtle blue temperature; gives a 4th high-emphasis luminance pole alongside ink, jade-deepest, and terra. CB-verified.

light-11.$description: Chart series 11 (dusty mauve) — light theme. CHART-ONLY. Warm grey-pink; mid-luminance pairing for stacked bars without leaving the warm register.

light-12.$description: Chart series 12 (clay tan / honey) — light theme. CHART-ONLY. Bronze-tan bridge between bronze (series-2) and ochre (series-8).

dark-8.$description: Chart series 8 (ochre / deep gold) — dark theme. Lifted L for cocoa bg; reads as warm-paper highlight.

dark-9.$description: Chart series 9 (aubergine / deep wine) — dark theme. Lifted from light-9; preserves wine character without alarm-red collision with terra.

dark-10.$description: Chart series 10 (cobalt-ink) — dark theme. Lifted significantly so it survives on cocoa bg — reads as cool-slate, not navy. Still lower saturation than tableau-blue.

dark-12.$description: Chart series 12 (clay tan / honey) — dark theme.
